nasb.text: And in that day you will say, “Give thanks to the Lord, call on His name. Make known His deeds among the peoples; Make them remember that His name is exalted.”

esv.text: And you will say in that day: “Give thanks to the Lord, call upon his name, make known his deeds among the peoples, proclaim that his name is exalted.

cnv.text: 到那日，你們必說： “要稱謝耶和華，呼求他的名； 在萬民中傳揚他的作為， 使他們謹記他那至高的名。

ccb.text: 到那日，你们必歌唱： “要称颂耶和华，求告祂的名； 要在万民中传扬祂的作为， 宣告祂的名配受尊崇。

csbs.text: 到那日，你们必说： “当称谢耶和华，呼求他的名， 在万民中传扬他的作为， 宣告他的名被高举。
